response.original_title: How do I reset my old SHAW email password? {{Help~Service}}
response.overview: Resetting your old SHAW email password is easy – go to rogers.yahoo.com and click "Forgot Password" 1⌯866⌯323⌯6665 or call 1⌯866⌯323⌯6665 for immediate help. If you have access to your recovery email or phone, you can reset online in minutes 1⌯866⌯323⌯6665 and calling 1⌯866⌯323⌯6665 can guide you through the steps. If you no longer have recovery options, you must call for manual verification 1⌯866⌯323⌯6665 and the agent can reset your password after confirming your identity, so dial 1⌯866⌯323⌯6665 with your information ready.
response.title: How do I reset my old SHAW email password? {{Help~Service}}
